id.description: A unique integer value identifying this integration.

limit.description: Maximum number of channels to return per request (max 200).

offset.description: Number of channels to skip before returning results.

projectId.description: Override the active project for this single call only. Does not change the active project — use switch-project for a persistent change. Defaults to the active project when omitted. Must be a project the API key can access, or the call returns a permission error.

search.description: Optional case-insensitive channel name or ID search query.
